verses.geez: ወነበቦሙ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወለአሮን ፡ ወይቤሎሙ ፤

translations.lxx: And the Lord spoke to Moses and Aaron, saying,
translations.kjv: And the LORD spake unto Moses and Aaron, saying,

verses.geez:
እመቦ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ዘወፅአ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሕብረ ፡ ማእሱ ፡ ትእምርት ፡ ከመ ፡ ርሜት ፡ ወጻዕደወት ፡ ወኮነት ፡ ውስተ ፡
                  ማእሱ ፡ ሕብረ ፡ ለምጽ ፡ ይሑር ፡ ኀበ ፡ ካህን ፡ አሮን ፡ አው ፡ ኀበ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ እምደቂቁ ፡ እምካህናት ።

translations.lxx: If any man should have in the skin of his flesh a bright clear spot, and there should be in the skin of his flesh a plague of leprosy, he shall be brought to Aaron the priest, or to one of his sons the priests.
translations.kjv: When a man shall have in the skin of his flesh a rising, a scab, or bright spot, and it be in the skin of his flesh like the plague of leprosy; then he shall be brought unto Aaron the priest, or unto one of his sons the priests:

verses.geez:
ወይርአያ ፡ ካህን ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ሕብር ፡ እንተ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሕብረ ፡ ማእሱ ፡ ወእመኒ ፡ ተወለጠ ፡ ሥዕርታ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡
                  ሕብር ፡ ወጻዕደወ ፡ ወእመኒ ፡ እኩይ ፡ ርእየታ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ሕብር ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሕብረ ፡ ማእሱ ፡ ወሕብረ ፡ ለምጽ ፡ ይእቲ
                  ፡ ይርአያ ፡ ካህን ፡ ወያርኵሳ ።

translations.lxx: And the priest shall view the spot in the skin of his flesh; and if the hair in the spot be changed to white, and the appearance of the spot be below the skin of the flesh, it is a plague of leprosy; and the priest shall look upon it, and pronounce him unclean.
translations.kjv: And the priest shall look on the plague in the skin of the flesh: and when the hair in the plague is turned white, and the plague in sight be deeper than the skin of his flesh, it is a plague of leprosy: and the priest shall look on him, and pronounce him unclean.

verses.geez:
ወእመሰ ፡ ጸዐዳ ፡ ሕብር ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሕብረ ፡ ማእሱ ፡ ወኢኮነት ፡ እኩ[የ] ፡ ርእየታ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ማእሱ ፡
                  ወኢተወለጠት ፡ ሥዕርታ ፡ ወኢጻዕደወ ፡ ወይእቲኒ ፡ ኢታስተርኢ ፡ በሕቁ ፡ ወያጸንሖ ፡ ካህን ፡ ሰቡዐ ፡ ዕለተ ፡ በእንተ ፡
                  ይእቲ ፡ ሕብር ።

translations.lxx: But if the spot be clear and white in the skin of his flesh, yet the appearance of it be not deep below the skin, and its hair have not changed itself for white hair, but it is dark, then the priest shall separate him that has the spot seven days;
translations.kjv: If the bright spot be white in the skin of his flesh, and in sight be not deeper than the skin, and the hair thereof be not turned white; then the priest shall shut up him that hath the plague seven days:

verses.geez:
ወበሳብዕት ፡ ዕለት ፡ ይሬእያ ፡ ካህን ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ሕብር ፡ ወናሁ ፡ ሀለወት ፡ ዓዲሃ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ሕብር ፡ ቅድሜሁ ፡
                  ወኢኀደገት ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ሕብር ፡ እምነ ፡ ማእሱ ፡ ወያጸንሖ ፡ ካህን ፡ ካልአ ፡ ሰቡዐ ፡ ዕለተ ።

translations.lxx: and the priest shall look on the spot the seventh day; and, behold, if the spot remains before him, if the spot has not spread in the skin, then the priest shall separate him the second time seven days.
translations.kjv: And the priest shall look on him the seventh day: and, behold, if the plague in his sight be at a stay, and the plague spread not in the skin; then the priest shall shut him up seven days more:

verses.geez:
ወይሬእዮ ፡ ካህን ፡ ዳግመ ፡ በሳብዕት ፡ ዕለት ፡ ወናሁ ፡ ኢታስተርኢ ፡ በሕቁ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ሕብር ፡ ወኢኀደገት ፡ እምነ
                  ፡ ማእሱ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ሕብር ፡ ወያነጽሖ ፡ ካህን ፡ እስመ ፡ ትእምርት ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ወየኀፅብ ፡ አልባሲሁ ፡ ወንጹሐ ፡ ይከውን
                  ።

translations.lxx: And the priest shall look upon him the second time on the seventh day; and, behold, if the spot be dark, and the spot have not spread in the skin, then the priest shall pronounce him clean; for it is a mere mark, and the man shall wash his garments and be clean.
translations.kjv: And the priest shall look on him again the seventh day: and, behold, if the plague be somewhat dark, and the plague spread not in the skin, the priest shall pronounce him clean: it is but a scab: and he shall wash his clothes, and be clean.

verses.geez:
ወእመሰ ፡ ተወለጠት ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ሕብር ፡ ወእኪተ ፡ ኮነት ፡ ውስተ ፡ ማእሱ ፡ እምድኅረ ፡ ርእዮ ፡ ካህን ፡ ወአንጽሖ ፡
                  ወየሐውር ፡ ዳግመ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ካህን ።

translations.lxx: But if the bright spot should have changed and spread in the skin, after the priest has seen him for the purpose of purifying him, then shall he appear the second time to the priest,
translations.kjv: But if the scab spread much abroad in the skin, after that he hath been seen of the priest for his cleansing, he shall be seen of the priest again:

verses.geez:
ወይሬእዮ ፡ ካህን ፡ ወናሁ ፡ አክየት ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ሕብር ፡ ውስተ ፡ ማእሱ ፡ ወያረኵሶ ፡ ካህን ፡ እስመ ፡ ለምጽ ፡
                  ይእቲ ።

translations.lxx: and the priest shall look upon him; and, behold, if the mark have spread in the skin, then the priest shall pronounce him unclean: it is a leprosy.
translations.kjv: And if the priest see that, behold, the scab spreadeth in the skin, then the priest shall pronounce him unclean: it is a leprosy.

verses.geez: ወሕብረ ፡ ለምጽ ፡ እመ ፡ ወፅአት ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ የሐውር ፡ ኀበ ፡ ካህን ።

translations.lxx: And if a man have a plague of leprosy, then he shall come to the priest;
translations.kjv: When the plague of leprosy is in a man, then he shall be brought unto the priest;

verses.geez:
ወይሬእዮ ፡ ካህን ፡ ወናሁ ፡ ከመ ፡ ርምየት ፡ ጸዐዳ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ማእሱ ፡ ወአውፅአት ፡ ሥዕተ ፡ ጸዐዳ ፡
                  ወጐንደየት ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሥጋሁ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ዘዳኅን ፡ ውስተ ፡ ዘሕያው ፡ ሕብረ ፡ ማእሱ ፤

translations.lxx: and the priest shall look, and, behold, if it is a white spot in the skin, and it has changed the hair to white, and there be some of the sound part of the quick flesh in the sore—
translations.kjv: And the priest shall see him: and, behold, if the rising be white in the skin, and it have turned the hair white, and there be quick raw flesh in the rising;

verses.geez: ይእቲ ፡ ትእምርት ፡ ጸዐዳ ፡ ወያረኵሶ ፡ ካህን ፡ ወኢያፀንሕ ፡ እስመ ፡ ርኩስ ፡ ውእቱ ።

translations.lxx: it is a leprosy waxing old in the skin of the flesh; and the priest shall pronounce him unclean, and shall separate him, because he is unclean.
translations.kjv: It is an old leprosy in the skin of his flesh, and the priest shall pronounce him unclean, and shall not shut him up: for he is unclean.

verses.geez:
ወእመሰ ፡ ወጽአ ፡ ለምጽ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ማእሱ ፡ ወከደነ ፡ ሕብረ ፡ ለምጽ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ማእሶ ፡ እምርእሱ ፡ እስከ ፡ እገሪሁ
                  ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ይሬእዮ ፡ ካህን ፤

translations.lxx: And if the leprosy should have come out very evidently in the skin, and the leprosy should cover all the skin of the patient from the head to the feet, wheresoever the priest shall look;
translations.kjv: And if a leprosy break out abroad in the skin, and the leprosy cover all the skin of him that hath the plague from his head even to his foot, wheresoever the priest looketh;

verses.geez:
[ወርእዮ ፡ ካህን ፡] ከመ ፡ ከደኖ ፡ ለምጽ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ሕብረ ፡ ማእሱ ፡ ያነጽሖ ፡ እስመ ፡ ኵለንታሁ ፡ ተወለጠ ፡
                  ወጻዕደወ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ንጹሕ ፡ ውእቱ ።

translations.lxx: then the priest shall look, and, behold, the leprosy has covered all the skin of the flesh; and the priest shall pronounce him clean of the plague, because it has changed all to white, it is clean.
translations.kjv: Then the priest shall consider: and, behold, if the leprosy have covered all his flesh, he shall pronounce him clean that hath the plague: it is all turned white: he is clean.

verses.geez: ወበዕለተ ፡ አስተርአየ ፡ ላዕሌሁ ፡ ሕብር ፡ ዘዳኅን ፡ ይረኵስ ።

translations.lxx: But on whatsoever day the quick flesh shall appear on him, he shall be pronounced unclean.
translations.kjv: But when raw flesh appeareth in him, he shall be unclean.

verses.geez:
ወይሬእዮ ፡ ካህን ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ሕብር ፡ ዘዳኅን ፡ ወያረኵሶ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ሕብር ፡ ዘዳኅን ፡ ወበእንተ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ርኩስ
                  ፡ ውእቱ ፡ እስመ ፡ ለምጽ ፡ ኮነ ።

translations.lxx: And the priest shall look upon the sound flesh, and the sound flesh shall prove him to be unclean; for it is unclean, it is a leprosy.
translations.kjv: And the priest shall see the raw flesh, and pronounce him to be unclean: for the raw flesh is unclean: it is a leprosy.

verses.geez: ወእመሰ ፡ ኀደገ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ሕብር ፡ ዘዳኅን ፡ ወተወለጠ ፡ ወጻዕደወት ፡ የሐውር ፡ ኀበ ፡ ካህን ።

translations.lxx: But if the sound flesh be restored and changed to white, then shall he come to the priest;
translations.kjv: Or if the raw flesh turn again, and be changed unto white, he shall come unto the priest;

verses.geez:
ወይሬእዮ ፡ ካህን ፡ ወናሁ ፡ ተወለጠት ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ሕብር ፡ ወጻዕደወት ፡ ወያነጽሓ ፡ ካህን ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ሕብር ፡ እስመ
                  ፡ ንጹሐ ፡ ኮነ ።

translations.lxx: and the priest shall see him, and, behold, if the plague is turned white, then the priest shall pronounce the patient clean: he is clean.
translations.kjv: And the priest shall see him: and, behold, if the plague be turned into white; then the priest shall pronounce him clean that hath the plague: he is clean.

verses.geez: ወለእመ ፡ ፈርገገ ፡ ሥጋሁ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ርምየተ ፡ ቍስሉ ፡ ሐይዎ ፤

translations.lxx: And if the flesh should have become an ulcer in his skin, and should be healed,
translations.kjv: The flesh also, in which, even in the skin thereof, was a boil, and is healed,

verses.geez:
ወወፅአ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ መካ[ነ] ፡ ቍስሉ ፡ ጸዐዳ ፡ ከመ ፡ ርምየት ፡ እንተ ፡ ታስተርኢ ፡ ጸዓድዒድ ፡ አው ፡
                  ቀያሕይሕት ፡ ያርእዮ ፡ ለካህን ።

translations.lxx: and there should be in the place of the ulcer a white sore, or one looking white and bright, or fiery, and it shall be seen by the priest;
translations.kjv: And in the place of the boil there be a white rising, or a bright spot, white, and somewhat reddish, and it be shewed to the priest;

verses.geez:
ወናሁ ፡ እኪት ፡ ይእቲ ፡ እምነ ፡ ማእሱ ፡ ወሥዕርታኒ ፡ ተወለጠ ፡ ወጻዕደወ ፡ ወያረኵሶ ፡ ካህን ፡ እስመ ፡ ሕብረ ፡
                  ለምጽ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ወውስተ ፡ ርሜት ፡ ወፅአት ።

translations.lxx: then the priest shall look, and, behold, if the appearance be beneath the skin, and its hair has changed to white, then the priest shall pronounce him unclean; because it is a leprosy, it has broken out in the ulcer.
translations.kjv: And if, when the priest seeth it, behold, it be in sight lower than the skin, and the hair thereof be turned white; the priest shall pronounce him unclean: it is a plague of leprosy broken out of the boil.

verses.geez:
ወእመሰ ፡ ርእዮ ፡ ካህን ፡ አልቦ ፡ ጸዐዳ ፡ ሥዕርተ ፡ ውስቴታ ፡ ወኢኮነት ፡ እኪተ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሕብረ ፡ ማእሱ ፡
                  ወለሊሃኒ ፡ ኢታስተርኢ ፡ ወያፀንሖ ፡ ካህን ፡ ሰቡዐ ፡ ዕለተ ።

translations.lxx: But if the priest look, and behold there is no white hair on it, and it be not below the skin of the flesh, and it be dark-coloured; then the priest shall separate him seven days.
translations.kjv: But if the priest look on it, and, behold, there be no white hairs therein, and if it be not lower than the skin, but be somewhat dark; then the priest shall shut him up seven days:

verses.geez:
ለእመ ፡ ተክዕወት ፡ ውስተ ፡ ማእሱ ፡ ያረኵሶ ፡ ካህን ፡ እስመ ፡ ሕብረ ፡ ለምጽ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ወውስተ ፡ ርሜት ፡
                  ወፅአት ።

translations.lxx: But if it manifestly spread over the skin, then the priest shall pronounce him unclean: it is a plague of leprosy; it has broken out in the ulcer.
translations.kjv: And if it spread much abroad in the skin, then the priest shall pronounce him unclean: it is a plague.

verses.geez: ወእመሰ ፡ በመካና ፡ ነበረት ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ሕብር ፡ ወኢተክዕወት ፡ ርምየ[ተ] ፡ ቍስል ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ወያነጽሖ ፡ ካህን ።

translations.lxx: But if the bright spot should remain in its place and not spread, it is the scar of the ulcer; and the priest shall pronounce him clean.
translations.kjv: But if the bright spot stay in his place, and spread not, it is a burning boil; and the priest shall pronounce him clean.

verses.geez:
ወለእመ ፡ ፈርገገ ፡ ሥጋ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ማእሱ ፡ እመኒ ፡ ውዕየተ ፡ እሳት ፡ ወወፅአት ፡ ውስተ ፡ ማእሱ ፡ ዘዳኅን ፡
                  እምነ ፡ ውዕየተ ፡ እሳት ፡ ወአስተርአየ ፡ ሕብ[ር] ፡ ጸዐዳ ፡ እንዘ ፡ ታቅየሐይሕ ፡ አው ፡ ጸዓድዒድ ፤

translations.lxx: And if the flesh be in his skin in a state of fiery inflammation, and there should be in his skin the part which is healed of the inflammation, bright, clear, and white, suffused with red or very white;
translations.kjv: Or if there be any flesh, in the skin whereof there is a hot burning, and the quick flesh that burneth have a white bright spot, somewhat reddish, or white;

verses.geez:
ወይሬእያ ፡ ካህን ፡ ወናሁ ፡ ወለጠት ፡ ሥዕርተ ፡ ጸዓዳ ፡ ወአስተርአየ ፡ ወርእየታኒ ፡ እኩይ ፡ እምነ ፡ ማእሱ ፡
                  ለምጽ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ወውስተ ፡ ውዕየት ፡ ወፅአት ፡ ወያረኵሶ ፡ ካህን ፡ እስመ ፡ ሕብረ ፡ ለምጽ ፡ ይእቲ ።

translations.lxx: then the priest shall look upon him, and, behold, if the hair being white is changed to a bright colour, and its appearance is lower than the skin, it is a leprosy; it has broken out in the inflammation, and the priest shall pronounce him unclean: it is a plague of leprosy.
translations.kjv: Then the priest shall look upon it: and, behold, if the hair in the bright spot be turned white, and it be in sight deeper than the skin; it is a leprosy broken out of the burning: wherefore the priest shall pronounce him unclean: it is the plague of leprosy.

verses.geez:
ወእመሰ ፡ ርእዮ ፡ ካህን ፡ ወናሁ ፡ አልቦ ፡ ውስቴታ ፡ ሥዕርተ ፡ ጸዐዳ ፡ ዘያስተርኢ ፡ ወኢኮነት ፡ እኪተ ፡ እምነ ፡
                  ማእሱ ፡ ወለሊሃኒ ፡ ኢታስተርኢ ፡ ወያጸንሖ ፡ ካህን ፡ ሰቡዐ ፡ ዕለተ ።

translations.lxx: But if the priest should look, and, behold, there is not in the bright spot any white hair, and it should not be lower than the skin, and it should be dark, then the priest shall separate him seven days.
translations.kjv: But if the priest look on it, and, behold, there be no white hair in the bright spot, and it be no lower than the other skin, but be somewhat dark; then the priest shall shut him up seven days:

verses.geez:
ወይሬእዮ ፡ ካህን ፡ በሳብዕት ፡ ዕለት ፡ ለእመ ፡ ተክዕወት ፡ ውስተ ፡ ማእሱ ፡ ያረኵሶ ፡ ካህን ፡ እስመ ፡ ሕብረ ፡
                  ለምጽ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ወውስተ ፡ ርምየት ፡ ወፅአት ።

translations.lxx: And the priest shall look upon him on the seventh day; and if the spot be much spread in the skin, then the priest shall pronounce him unclean: it is a plague of leprosy, it has broken out in the ulcer.
translations.kjv: And the priest shall look upon him the seventh day: and if it be spread much abroad in the skin, then the priest shall pronounce him unclean: it is the plague of leprosy.

verses.geez:
ወእመሰ ፡ በመካና ፡ ነበረት ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ሕብር ፡ ወኢተክዕወት ፡ ውስተ ፡ ማእሱ ፡ ወለሊሃኒ ፡ ኢታስተርኢ ፡ ርምየ[ተ]
                  ፡ ውዕየት ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ወያነጽሖ ፡ ካህን ፡ እስመ ፡ መካና ፡ ለዕየት ፡ ይእቲ ።

translations.lxx: But if the bright spot remain stationary, and be not spread in the skin, but the sore should be dark, it is a scar of inflammation; and the priest shall pronounce him clean, for it is the mark of the inflammation.
translations.kjv: And if the bright spot stay in his place, and spread not in the skin, but it be somewhat dark; it is a rising of the burning, and the priest shall pronounce him clean: for it is an inflammation of the burning.

verses.geez: ወእመቦ ፡ ብእሴ ፡ አው ፡ ብእሲተ ፡ ዘወፅአ ፡ ሕብረ ፡ ለምጽ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ርእሱ ፡ አው ፡ ውስተ ፡ ጽሕሙ ፤

translations.lxx: And if a man or a woman have in them a plague of leprosy in the head or the beard;
translations.kjv: If a man or woman have a plague upon the head or the beard;

verses.geez:
ወይሬእያ ፡ ካህን ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ሕብር ፡ ወናሁ ፡ ርእየታ ፡ እኩይ ፡ እምነ ፡ ማእሱ ፡ ወቦ ፡ ውስቴታ ፡ ሥዕርተ ፡
                  ጸዐዳ ፡ ቀጣነ ፡ እንተ ፡ ወፅአት ፡ ወያረኵሶ ፡ ካህን ፡ እስመ ፡ ትእምርተ ፡ ለምጽ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ዘርእስ ፡ አው ፡ ለምጽ ፡
                  ዘጽሕም ፡ ይእቲ ።

translations.lxx: then the priest shall look on the plague, and, behold, if the appearance of it be beneath the skin, and in it there be thin yellowish hair, then the priest shall pronounce him unclean: it is a scurf, it is a leprosy of the head or a leprosy of the beard.
translations.kjv: Then the priest shall see the plague: and, behold, if it be in sight deeper than the skin; and there be in it a yellow thin hair; then the priest shall pronounce him unclean: it is a dry scall, even a leprosy upon the head or beard.

verses.geez:
ወእመሰ ፡ ርእዮ ፡ ካህን ፡ ሕብራ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ትእምርት ፡ ወኢኮነ ፡ እኩ[የ] ፡ ርእየታ ፡ እምነ ፡ ማእሱ ፡ ወሥዕርተ
                  ፡ ጸዐዳ ፡ አልቦ ፡ ውስቴታ ፡ ወያጸንሖ ፡ ካህን ፡ ለሕብረ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ትእምርት ፡ ሰቡዐ ፡ ዕለተ ።

translations.lxx: And if the priest should see the plague of the scurf, and, behold, the appearance of it be not beneath the skin, and there is no yellowish hair in it, then the priest shall set apart him that has the plague of the scurf seven days.
translations.kjv: And if the priest look on the plague of the scall, and, behold, it be not in sight deeper than the skin, and that there is no black hair in it; then the priest shall shut up him that hath the plague of the scall seven days:

verses.geez:
ወይሬእያ ፡ ካህን ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ሕብር ፡ በሳብዕት ፡ ዕለት ፡ ወናሁ ፡ ኢተክዕወት ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ሕብር ፡ ወሥዕርተ ፡ ጸዐዳ
                  ፡ አልቦ ፡ ውስቴታ ፡ ወርእየታኒ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ሕብር ፡ ኢኮነ ፡ እኩየ ፡ እምነ ፡ ማእሱ ፤

translations.lxx: And the priest shall look at the plague on the seventh day; and, behold, if the scurf be not spread, and there be no yellowish hair on it, and the appearance of the scurf is not hollow under the skin;
translations.kjv: And in the seventh day the priest shall look on the plague: and, behold, if the scall spread not, and there be in it no yellow hair, and the scall be not in sight deeper than the skin;

verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ ይትላጸይ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ መካነ ፡ ማእሱ ፡ ኢትወፅእ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ሕብር ፡ ያጸንሓ ፡ ካህን ፡ ለይእቲ ፡
                  ሕብር ፡ ካልአ ፡ ሰቡዐ ፡ ዕለተ ።

translations.lxx: then the skin shall be shaven, but the scurf shall not be shaven; and the priest shall set aside the person having the scurf the second time for seven days.
translations.kjv: He shall be shaven, but the scall shall he not shave; and the priest shall shut up him that hath the scall seven days more:

verses.geez:
ወይሬእያ ፡ ካህን ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ሕብር ፡ በሳብዕት ፡ ዕለት ፡ ወናሁ ፡ ኢተክዕወት ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ሕብር ፡ ውስተ ፡ ማእሱ ፡
                  እምድኅረ ፡ ተላጸየ ፡ ወርእየታኒ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ሕብር ፡ ኢኮነ ፡ እኩ[የ] ፡ እምነ ፡ ማእሱ ፡ ወያነጽሖ ፡ ካህን ፡ ወኀፂቦ
                  ፡ አልባሲሁ ፡ ንጹሐ ፡ ይከውን ።

translations.lxx: And the priest shall see the scurf on the seventh day; and, behold, if the scurf is not spread in the skin after the man's being shaved, and the appearance of the scurf is not hollow beneath the skin, then the priest shall pronounce him clean; and he shall wash his garments, and be clean.
translations.kjv: And in the seventh day the priest shall look on the scall: and, behold, if the scall be not spread in the skin, nor be in sight deeper than the skin; then the priest shall pronounce him clean: and he shall wash his clothes, and be clean.

verses.geez: ወእመሰ ፡ ተክዕወት ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ሕብር ፡ ውስተ ፡ ማእሱ ፡ እምድኅረ ፡ አንጽሕዎ ፤

translations.lxx: But if the scurf be indeed spread in the skin after he has been purified,
translations.kjv: But if the scall spread much in the skin after his cleansing;

verses.geez:
ይሬእዮ ፡ ካህን ፡ ወናሁ ፡ ተክዕወት ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ሕብር ፡ ውስተ ፡ ማእሱ ፡ ኢይፈትን ፡ ካህን ፡ ሥዕርተ ፡ ጸዐዳ ፡
                  እስመ ፡ ርኩስ ፡ ውእቱ ።

translations.lxx: then the priest shall look, and, behold, if the scurf be spread in the skin, the priest shall not examine concerning the yellow hair, for he is unclean.
translations.kjv: Then the priest shall look on him: and, behold, if the scall be spread in the skin, the priest shall not seek for yellow hair; he is unclean.

verses.geez:
ወእመሰ ፡ ውስተ ፡ መካና ፡ ነበረት ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ሕብር ፡ ወሥዕርተ ፡ ጸሊም ፡ ወፅአ ፡ ውስቴታ ፡ ሐይወት ፡ ይእቲ ፡
                  ሕብር ፡ ወንጹሕ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወያነጽሖ ፡ ካህን ።

translations.lxx: But if the scurf remain before him in its place, and a dark hair should have arisen in it, the scurf is healed: he is clean, and the priest shall pronounce him clean.
translations.kjv: But if the scall be in his sight at a stay, and that there is black hair grown up therein; the scall is healed, he is clean: and the priest shall pronounce him clean.

verses.geez: ወለብእሲኒ ፡ አው ፡ ለብእሲትኒ ፡ እመቦ ፡ ዘወፅአ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ማእሰ ፡ ሥጋሁ ፡ በራህርህት ፡ አው ፡ ጸዓድዒድ ፤

translations.lxx: And if a man or woman should have in the skin of their flesh spots of a bright whiteness,
translations.kjv: If a man also or a woman have in the skin of their flesh bright spots, even white bright spots;

verses.geez:
ይሬእያ ፡ ካህን ፡ ወናሁ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ማእሰ ፡ ሥጋሁ ፡ ብርህት ፡ አው ፡ ጸዓድዒድ ፡ ሕንብርብሬ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ወወፅአት ፡
                  ውስተ ፡ ማእሰ ፡ ሥጋሁ ፡ ወንጹሕ ፡ ውእቱ ።

translations.lxx: then the priest shall look; and, behold, there being bright spots of a bright whiteness in the skin of their flesh, it is a tetter; it bursts forth in the skin of his flesh; he is clean.
translations.kjv: Then the priest shall look: and, behold, if the bright spots in the skin of their flesh be darkish white; it is a freckled spot that groweth in the skin; he is clean.

verses.geez: እመቦ ፡ ዘተመልጠ ፡ ርእሱ ፡ በራሕ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወንጹሕ ፡ ውእቱ ።

translations.lxx: And if any one's head should lose the hair, he is only bald, he is clean.
translations.kjv: And the man whose hair is fallen off his head, he is bald; yet is he clean.

verses.geez: ወእመሰ ፡ መንገለ ፡ ፍጽሙ ፡ ተመልጠ ፡ ርእሱ ፡ ዘስንሐት ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወንጹሕ ፡ ውእቱ ።

translations.lxx: And if his head should lose the hair in front, he is forehead bald: he is clean.
translations.kjv: And he that hath his hair fallen off from the part of his head toward his face, he is forehead bald: yet is he clean.

verses.geez:
ወእመሰ ፡ ወፅአት ፡ ውስተ ፡ ብርሐቱ ፡ ወውስተ ፡ ስንሐቱ ፡ ሕብረ ፡ ጸዐዳ ፡ አው ፡ ቀያሕይሕት ፡ ለምጽ ፡ ይእቲ ፡
                  ወወፅአ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ብርሐቱ ፡ አው ፡ ውስተ ፡ ስንሐቱ ።

translations.lxx: And if there should be in his baldness of head, or his baldness of forehead, a white or fiery plague, it is leprosy in his baldness of head, or baldness of forehead.
translations.kjv: And if there be in the bald head, or bald forehead, a white reddish sore; it is a leprosy sprung up in his bald head, or his bald forehead.

verses.geez:
ወይሬእያ ፡ ካህን ፡ ወናሁ ፡ ርእየተ ፡ ሕብራ ፡ ጸዐዳ ፡ አው ፡ ቀያሕይሕት ፡ ውስተ ፡ ብርሐቱ ፡ አው ፡ ውስተ ፡
                  ስንሐቱ ፡ ከመ ፡ ርእየተ ፡ ለምጽ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ማእሰ ፡ ሥጋሁ ፤

translations.lxx: And the priest shall look upon him, and, behold, if the appearance of the plague be white or inflamed in his baldness of head or baldness in front, as the appearance of leprosy in the skin of his flesh,
translations.kjv: Then the priest shall look upon it: and, behold, if the rising of the sore be white reddish in his bald head, or in his bald forehead, as the leprosy appeareth in the skin of the flesh;

verses.geez:
ዘለምጽ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ብእሲሁ ፡ ወምዕረ ፡ ይሬእያ ፡ ካህን ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ሕብር ፡ እንተ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ርእሱ ፡ አው ፡ እንተ
                  ፡ ውስተ ፡ ስንሐቱ ።

translations.lxx: he is a leprous man: the priest shall surely pronounce him unclean, his plague is in his head.
translations.kjv: He is a leprous man, he is unclean: the priest shall pronounce him utterly unclean; his plague is in his head.

verses.geez:
ወዘለምጽኒ ፡ ዘሀሎ ፡ ላዕሌሁ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ሕብር ፡ ዘለምጽ ፡ አልባሲሁ ፡ ፍቱሐ ፡ ይኩን ፡ ወርእሱኒ ፡ ክሡተ ፡ ይኩን
                  ፡ ወይገልብብ ፡ አፉሁ ፡ ወርኩሰ ፡ ይሰመይ ፤

translations.lxx: And the leper in whom the plague is, let his garments be ungirt, and his head uncovered; and let him have a covering put upon his mouth, and he shall be called unclean.
translations.kjv: And the leper in whom the plague is, his clothes shall be rent, and his head bare, and he shall put a covering upon his upper lip, and shall cry, Unclean, unclean.

verses.geez:
ኵሎ ፡ መዋዕለ ፡ መጠነ ፡ ሀሎ ፡ ላዕሌሁ ፡ ለምጽ ፡ ወርኩስ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወርኩሰ ፡ ይኩን ፡ ወዕሉለ ፡ ይኩን ፡ አፍአ
                  ፡ እምትዕይንት ፡ ይኩን ፡ ምንባሩ ።

translations.lxx: All the days in which the plague shall be upon him, being unclean, he shall be esteemed unclean; he shall dwell apart, his place of sojourn shall be without the camp.
translations.kjv: All the days wherein the plague shall be in him he shall be defiled; he is unclean: he shall dwell alone; without the camp shall his habitation be.

verses.geez:
ወውስተ ፡ ልብስኒ ፡ እመ ፡ ወፅአ ፡ ትእምርተ ፡ ለምጽ ፡ እመኒ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ልብሰ ፡ ፀምር ፡ ወእመኒ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ልብሰ
                  ፡ ዐጌ ፤

translations.lxx: And if a garment have in it the plague of leprosy, a garment of wool, or a garment of flax,
translations.kjv: The garment also that the plague of leprosy is in, whether it be a woollen garment, or a linen garment;

verses.geez:
እመኒ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ስፍሑ ፡ ወእመኒ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ፋእሙ ፡ እመኒ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ዐጌ ፡ ወእመኒ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ፀምር ፡ እመኒ ፡
                  ውስተ ፡ ማእስ ፡ ወእመኒ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ምግባረ ፡ ማእስ ፤

translations.lxx: either in the warp or in the woof, or in the linen, or in the woollen threads, or in a skin, or in any workmanship of skin,
translations.kjv: Whether it be in the warp, or woof; of linen, or of woollen; whether in a skin, or in any thing made of skin;

verses.geez:
ወወፅአት ፡ ሕብር ፡ እንተ ፡ ታኅመለምል ፡ አው ፡ እንተ ፡ ታቅየሐይሕ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ማእስ ፡ አው ፡ ውስተ ፡ ልብስ ፡
                  እመኒ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ስፍሑ ፡ ወእመኒ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ፋእሙ ፡ አው ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ንዋየ ፡ ማእስ ፡ ወሕብረ ፡ ለምጽ ፡ ይእቲ
                  ፡ ያርእያ ፡ ለካህን ።

translations.lxx: and the plague be greenish or reddish in the skin, or in the garment, either in the warp, or in the woof, or in any utensil of skin, it is a plague of leprosy, and he shall show it to the priest.
translations.kjv: And if the plague be greenish or reddish in the garment, or in the skin, either in the warp, or in the woof, or in any thing of skin; it is a plague of leprosy, and shall be shewed unto the priest:

verses.geez: ወይሬእያ ፡ ካህን ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ሕብር ፡ ወያጸንሓ ፡ ካህን ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ሕብር ፡ ሰቡዐ ፡ ዕለተ ።

translations.lxx: And the priest shall look upon the plague, and the priest shall set apart that which has the plague seven days.
translations.kjv: And the priest shall look upon the plague, and shut up it that hath the plague seven days:

verses.geez:
ወይሬእያ ፡ ካህን ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ሕብር ፡ በሳብዕት ፡ ዕለት ፡ ወለእመ ፡ ተክዕወት ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ሕብር ፡ ውስተ ፡ ውእቱ ፡
                  ልብስ ፡ እመኒ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ስፍሑ ፡ ወእመኒ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ፋእሙ ፡ አው ፡ ውስተ ፡ ማእስ ፡ አው ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ምግባር ፡
                  ዘማእስ ፡ ለምጽ ፡ እንተ ፡ ኢተኀድግ ፡ ይእቲ ።

translations.lxx: And the priest shall look upon the plague on the seventh day; and if the plague be spread in the garment, either in the warp or in the woof, or in the skin, in whatsoever things skins may be used in their workmanship, the plague is a confirmed leprosy; it is unclean.
translations.kjv: And he shall look on the plague on the seventh day: if the plague be spread in the garment, either in the warp, or in the woof, or in a skin, or in any work that is made of skin; the plague is a fretting leprosy; it is unclean.

verses.geez:
ያውዕይዎ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ልብስ ፡ እመኒ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ስፍሑ ፡ ወእመኒ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ፋእሙ ፡ እመኒ ፡ ዘፀምር ፡ ወእመኒ ፡
                  ዘዐጌ ፡ ወእመኒ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ንዋየ ፡ ማእስ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ዘወፅአት ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ሕብር ፡ እስመ ፡ ለምጽ ፡ ይእቲ ፡
                  እንተ ፡ ኢተኀድግ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ በእሳት ፡ ለይውዕይዎ ።

translations.lxx: He shall burn the garment, either the warp or woof in woollen garments or in flaxen, or in any utensil of skin, in which there may be the plague; because it is a confirmed leprosy; it shall be burnt with fire.
translations.kjv: He shall therefore burn that garment, whether warp or woof, in woollen or in linen, or any thing of skin, wherein the plague is: for it is a fretting leprosy; it shall be burnt in the fire.

verses.geez:
ወእምሰ ፡ ርእዮ ፡ ካህን ፡ ኢተክዕወት ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ሕብር ፡ ውስተውእቱ ፡ ልብስ ፡ እመኒ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ስፍሑ ፡ ወእመኒ ፡
                  ውስተ ፡ ፋእሙ ፡ ወእመኒ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ንዋይ ፡ ዘማእስ ፤

translations.lxx: And if the priest should see, and the plague be not spread in the garments, either in the warp or in the woof, or in any utensil of skin,
translations.kjv: And if the priest shall look, and, behold, the plague be not spread in the garment, either in the warp, or in the woof, or in any thing of skin;

verses.geez:
ወይኤዝዝ ፡ ካህን ፡ ይኅፅቡ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ወፅአት ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ሕብር ፡ ወያጸንሓ ፡ ካህን ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ሕብር ፡ ዳግመ ፡
                  ሰቡዐ ፡ መዋዕለ ።

translations.lxx: then the priest shall give directions, and one shall wash that on which there may have been the plague, and the priest shall set it aside a second time for seven days.
translations.kjv: Then the priest shall command that they wash the thing wherein the plague is, and he shall shut it up seven days more:

verses.geez:
ወይሬእያ ፡ ካህን ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ሕብር ፡ እምድኅረ ፡ ኀፀብዋ ፡ ወለእመ ፡ ኢኀደጋ ፡ ሕብረ ፡ ርእየታ ፡ ወለእመኒ ፡
                  ኢተዘርወት ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ሕብር ፡ ርኩስ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወበእሳት ፡ ያውዕይዎ ፡ እስመ ፡ አኀዘት ፡ ውስተ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ልብስ ፡ አው
                  ፡ ውስተ ፡ ስፍሑ ፡ አው ፡ ውስተ ፡ ፋእሙ ።

translations.lxx: And the priest shall look upon it after the plague has been washed; and if this, even the plague, has not changed its appearance, and the plague does not spread, it is unclean; it shall be burnt with fire: it is fixed in the garment, in the warp, or in the woof.
translations.kjv: And the priest shall look on the plague, after that it is washed: and, behold, if the plague have not changed his colour, and the plague be not spread; it is unclean; thou shalt burn it in the fire; it is fret inward, whether it be bare within or without.

verses.geez:
ወለእመሰ ፡ ርእዮ ፡ ካህን ፡ ኢታስተርኢ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ሕብር ፡ እምድኅረ ፡ ኀፀብዋ ፡ ያሴስሉ ፡ መካና ፡ እምውስተ ፡
                  ውእቱ ፡ ልብስ ፡ እመኒ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ስፍሑ ፡ ወእመኒ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ፋእሙ ፡ ወእመኒ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ማእስ ።

translations.lxx: And if the priest should look, and the spot be dark after it has been washed, he shall tear it off from the garment, either from the warp or from the woof, or from the skin.
translations.kjv: And if the priest look, and, behold, the plague be somewhat dark after the washing of it; then he shall rend it out of the garment, or out of the skin, or out of the warp, or out of the woof:

verses.geez:
ወእመሰ ፡ ዳግመ ፡ አስተርአየት ፡ ውስተ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ልብስ ፡ እመኒ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ስፍሑ ፡ ወእመኒ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ፋእሙ ፡
                  ወእመኒ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ንዋይ ፡ ዘማእስ ፡ ለምጽ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ወበእሳት ፡ ያውዕይዎ ፡ ለዘውስቴቱ ፡ ወፅአት ፡ ይእቲ ፡
                  ሕብር ።

translations.lxx: And if it should still appear in the garment, either in the warp or in the woof, or in any article of skin, it is a leprosy bursting forth: that wherein is the plague shall be burnt with fire.
translations.kjv: And if it appear still in the garment, either in the warp, or in the woof, or in any thing of skin; it is a spreading plague: thou shalt burn that wherein the plague is with fire.

verses.geez:
ወለእመሰ ፡ ተኀፂቦ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ልብስ ፡ እመኒ ፡ ዘውስተ ፡ ስፍሑ ፡ ወእመኒ ፡ ዘውስተ ፡ ፋእሙ ፡ ወእመኒ ፡ ውስተ ፡
                  ኵሉ ፡ ንዋየ ፡ ማእስ ፡ ኀደገቶ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ሕብር ፡ የኀፅብዎ ፡ ዳግመ ፡ ወንጹሐ ፡ ይከውን ።

translations.lxx: And the garment, or the warp, or the woof, or any article of skin, which shall be washed, and the plague depart from it, shall also be washed again, and shall be clean.
translations.kjv: And the garment, either warp, or woof, or whatsoever thing of skin it be, which thou shalt wash, if the plague be departed from them, then it shall be washed the second time, and shall be clean.

verses.geez:
ዝንቱኬ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ሕጉ ፡ ለሕብረ ፡ ለምጽ ፡ ዘይወፅእ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ልብስ ፡ እመኒ ፡ ዘፀምር ፡ ወእመኒ ፡ ዘዐጌ ፡
                  እመኒ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ስፍሑ ፡ ወውስተ ፡ ፋእሙኒ ፡ ወእመኒ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ንዋይ ፡ ዘማእስ ፡ በዘያነጽሕዎ ፡ ወበዘ ፡ ያረኵስዎ
                  ።

translations.lxx: This is the law of the plague of leprosy of a woollen or linen garment, either of the warp, or woof, or any leathern article, to pronounce it clean or unclean.
translations.kjv: This is the law of the plague of leprosy in a garment of woollen or linen, either in the warp, or woof, or any thing of skins, to pronounce it clean, or to pronounce it unclean.
